title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets on real-world events. After four years of regulatory battles including suing the CFTC, the company broke through to achieve a $22 billion valuation and billions in trading volume.
